content.problemStatement:
Doctor Kunj installed new software on cyborg Shresth.
This software introduced Shresth to range minimum queries.

Cyborg Shresth thought of TTT different problems in each of which you will be given
an array AAA of length NNN and an array BBB of length MMM. In each of these problems, you have to calculate:

‚ąĎi=1m‚ąĎj=imrangeMin(B[i],B[j])\sum_{i=1}^m \sum_{j=i}^m rangeMin(B[i],B[j])‚ąĎi=1m‚Äč‚ąĎj=im‚ÄčrangeMin(B[i],B[j])

Where rangeMin(i,j)rangeMin(i,j)rangeMin(i,j) returns the minimum element in the range of indices iii to jjj (both included) in array AAA.

It is given that array BBB consists of pairwise distinct elements and is in ascending order.

###Input Format:


First line will contain TTT, the number of different problems Cyborg Shresth thought of.
Each problem's input data will be given in three different lines.
The first line will contain NNN and MMM, the length of array AAA and BBB respectively.
The second line will contain NNN space separated positive integers, which form the array AAA. -
The third line will contain MMM space separated positive integers, which form the array BBB.
###Output Format:


For each different problem, print on a new line the answer to the problem, i.e. the value of ‚ąĎi=1m‚ąĎj=imrangeMin(B[i],B[j])\sum_{i=1}^m \sum_{j=i}^m rangeMin(B[i],B[j])‚ąĎi=1m‚Äč‚ąĎj=im‚ÄčrangeMin(B[i],B[j]) .
constraints: It is guaranteed that the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 106{10}^6106 .

For the given array AAA, we have to calculate rangeMin(1,1)+rangeMin(1,4)+rangeMin(1,6)+rangeMin(4,4)+rangeMin(4,6)+rangeMin(6,6)rangeMin(1,1) + rangeMin(1,4) + rangeMin(1,6) + rangeMin(4,4) + rangeMin(4,6) + rangeMin(6,6) rangeMin(1,1)+rangeMin(1,4)+rangeMin(1,6)+rangeMin(4,4)+rangeMin(4,6)+rangeMin(6,6).
